category_sources: source_facts.description says Container Network Interface plugins; official CNI documentation defines plugins as configuring container network interfaces.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cni-plugins; official CNI site and containernetworking repository use CNI plugins terminology.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official CNI site; official CNI documentation provides plugin documentation and the CNI specification; source_facts.repo points to the official plugin repository README.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/containernetworking/plugins, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Container Network Interface plugins; source_facts.executables lists individual CNI plugin binaries.
